prompt: Generate a cooking masterclass poster using Image 1 at the top to show the chef leading the class, and Image 2 at the bottom to represent the ingredients and food prepared during the class. Add the title: 'Culinary Masterclass with Chef Marco'
prompt_refined: Generate a professional cooking masterclass poster. In the top half of the poster, prominently feature the smiling male chef from Image 1, dressed in a white chef's uniform with crossed arms, to represent Chef Marco leading the class. In the bottom half, create a rich visual display of fresh, vibrant ingredients and prepared dishes, drawing heavily from the top-down perspective and specific elements (such as colorful vegetables, herbs, grains, and a prepared salad bowl on a wooden surface) found in Image 2. Integrate the rustic wooden background texture from Image 2 as a foundational element for this lower section. Overlay the title "Culinary Masterclass with Chef Marco" clearly and legibly on the poster, ensuring it integrates aesthetically with the overall design.
objects: Smiling male chef (from Image 1) in the top half
White chef's uniform with crossed arms
Colorful vegetables (e.g., bell peppers, tomatoes, cucumbers) in the bottom half
Fresh herbs (e.g., basil) in the bottom half
Grains (e.g., quinoa, in bowls) in the bottom half
Prepared salad bowl on a wooden surface, in the bottom half
Rustic wooden background texture in the bottom half
Textual title "Culinary Masterclass with Chef Marco"
A distinct top half featuring the chef
A distinct bottom half featuring ingredients from a top-down perspective
